title: erodium alpinum
intro: Erodium alpinum, also known as Alpine Heron's Bill, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe, Asia, and North Africa. Erodium alpinum has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Erodium alpinum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits, promoting wound healing, reducing inflammation, and supporting overall health.
